creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Thanks, imported.  Changes: 

=== 
diff -ru netscape3/Makefile netscape3.new/Makefile 
--- netscape3/Makefile	Fri Apr 11 20:32:50 1997 
+++ netscape3.new/Makefile	Wed Jun  4 01:50:24 1997 
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ 
DISTFILES=      netscape-v301-export.x86-unknown-bsd.tar.gz netscape-ko-v301.alpha-dec-osf2.0.tar.gz 

MAINTAINER=     junker@jazz.snu.ac.kr 
-# it depends on korean(hanyang) fonts 
+ 
RUN_DEPENDS=    ${X11BASE}/lib/X11/fonts/korean/hanyang:$(PORTSDIR)/korean/hanyangfonts 

RESTRICTED=	"Commercial software" 
diff -ru netscape3/pkg/COMMENT netscape3.new/pkg/COMMENT 
--- netscape3/pkg/COMMENT	Mon Apr  7 22:26:34 1997 
+++ netscape3.new/pkg/COMMENT	Wed Jun  4 01:50:44 1997 
@@ -1 +1 @@ 
-netscape-3.01 web-surfboard(international version, Korean) 
+netscape-3.01 web-surfboard (international version, Korean) 
diff -ru netscape3/pkg/PLIST netscape3.new/pkg/PLIST 
--- netscape3/pkg/PLIST	Fri Apr 11 20:33:15 1997 
+++ netscape3.new/pkg/PLIST	Wed Jun  4 01:51:13 1997 
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@ 
-@pkgdep kr-hanyangfonts-1.0 
@cwd /usr/local 
bin/netscape 
lib/netscape/LICENSE 
=== 

Note that I didn't test the port.
